BREEXZED

Trapped within constraints that suffocates being and becoming, i untie myself from the shackles binded on me, through the dispersion of my soul and the traces i leave of having existed, this site serves as a home for the one in me who knows nothing, but wants to learn.

Having seen how i saw myself, i realized, there was little i knew apart from myself. Self-knowledge is no mystery, understanding one thing is an implicit attribution to the one who understands. I want to have an understanding, yes of me, but more also of the world around me and of how it constituted, what role i could play in bringing out the beautiful pain of being this specific being, this person, whoami> breexzed

Base Interests

Philosophy what is known of being in the world
Systems what the world exhibits itself as to us beings
Epistemics how we know what we know to be, what knowing is, the constituents of knowledge
Sciences active engagement with the world around me, making explicit contact
Memetics the aliveness of knowledge
Technology the world as systems with implicit knowledge, a way of ordering reality
Entropy life in its rawest form
Information the smallest unit of reality
Co-ordination mutual understanding
Coherence inhabiting within everything in the between

Corpus

Projects, concepts, and articulations.

A filtered index of the work and ideas that make up the estate. The current seed is concept-, articulation-, signal-, and trail-first, with projects still supported as a future publishing surface.

Map

Map Explorer and graph navigation.

Graph is the primary surface. Toggle over to Map Explorer whenever you want the detailed tree and reading flow.

Map Surface
Navigate visually or move into the detailed explorer.
Graph ready

Signal

Signals and trails.

This surface stays open and intentionally quiet until there is something worth publishing into it.

Projects

Dedicated project surface.

A direct page for projects when you are ready to publish them, kept separate from the main ontology-driven corpus.

BREEXZED

A home for traces, projects, learning, and the slow arrangement of understanding.
